title: acalypha lagopus
intro: Acalypha lagopus, also known as the woolly mangle-wort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Acalypha lagopus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusion, and decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
